name: AA Audience
description: Developer of a mobile application designed to generate customers for the finance industry via mobile devices. The company's application is designed to collect data from partners and analyzes it using machine learning models, enabling financial institutions such as banks credit card companies, and financial services companies to generate customers' credit scores based on online and mobile activities.

name: Avision
description: Developer of an unmanned aerial navigation platform designed to control the communication and navigation of robots and drones. The company's platform is comprised of air traffic control software, drone built-in hardware components, and an integration API that automatically regulates traffic for all UAVs connected to it, enabling aerial industries to manage any number of drones with business applications ranging from entertainment to enterprise logistics.

name: BillTrim
description: Operator of a bill management platform intended to help consumers lower their monthly bills. The company's platform provides bill-trimming services for cable, cell phone, electricity, internet, auto insurance, home security, and others by negotiation to reduce the bills on behalf of the user, enabling consumers to save money on bills.

name: Blume
description: Provider of a female hygiene subscription box service intended to deliver safe and sustainable period products. The company offers a customized selection of pads and tampons, acne-fighting products, hygiene, and self-care items, enabling young females to get personal care products easily at their doorstep without needing to run to the drug store.

name: OurHealthMate
description: Operator of a health technology company intended to revolutionize healthcare and create positive social change. The company offers preventive health care, employee engagement, employee well-being, and financial wellness, enabling clients to manage organizational well-being.

name: Firefly
description: Operator of a targeted advertisement platform created to deliver outdoor marketing content. The company's platform installs proprietary displays atop ride-hailing vehicles and offers an out-of-home content marketing network that features outdoor advertising metrics and flexible targeting, enabling clients to deliver successful marketing and advertising strategies and measure where and when their campaign will have a greater impact throughout the city.

name: Folia Water
description: Developer and manufacturer of paper water filter products designed to reduce waterborne pathogens. The company's product uses large-scale paper machinery to manufacture low-cost nano-metal materials which are chemically functionalized fiber, enabling clients to help customers drink purified water at a low cost.

name: Meya.ai
description: Developer of a customer experience automation platform designed to automate conversational artificial intelligence and workflow. The company's platform permits the building, training, and hosting of digital assistants and bots using bot flow abstraction and features conversational framework, analytics, and tools for integration with messenger applications, enabling businesses and brands to reduce operational costs and expand customer experience capabilities.

name: Pellego
description: Flat fee firm focused on the 2.5m real estate agents who use their license part time. Beachhead market of real estate investors with an agent license. Growing at 100% per year (3 years in a row) with 13x LTV:CAC and $1m ARR.

name: Georama
description: Operator of an insights platform intended to grow by generating deeper and more authentic insights from consumers anywhere in the world. The company's patented technology blends the depth and authenticity of qualitative research with the speed and agility of quantitative research, enabling brands, agencies, and consulting firms to remotely capture consumer insights in real-time in a faster and easier way.

name: Swept
description: Developer of an operational cleaning management platform designed to oversee commercial cleaning businesses. The company's platform assists cleaning companies in communicating with employees and customers, completing inspections, and ordering supplies in real-time, enabling companies to increase profits and customer retention.

name: Tripplus
description: Operator of an online travel service company designed to intended an online meta-search engine for travel-related purposes. The company's platform can be used by users to book flight tickets and make hotel reservations along with an opportunity to earn reward points, enabling travelers to accumulate, redeem points, and get discounts on travel bookings.

name: VR Motion
description: Developer of VR enterprise software and hardware designed to improve driver training. The company's platform provides ultra-realistic virtual reality driver training systems to companies in the public, commercial, and private sectors for logistics controlling, enabling transportation and distribution industry clients to reduce the cost and risk to hire and retain employees.

name: WeFitter
description: Developer of fitness gaming platform designed to turn business into an engaged and healthy community. The company's platform assists digital health developers to integrate data and improve user engagement to track their calorie count and complete fitness challenges, enabling employees to improve their health by combining activity tracker data with gamification.

name: Chatter Research
description: Developer of an online market research platform designed to engage customers in conversational surveys over text message. The company's platform offers online customer feedback about a brand, product or company by using artificial intelligence and chatbots, as well as helps users to have a text message conversation with customers right after they have interacted with their brand and get immediate feedback, enabling businesses and brands to engage their customers in a conversational survey and get real time data to run their business.

name: Pluma
description: Provider of mobile coaching platform intended to facilitate development and executive coaching for millennials. The company's platform offers personalized coaching services, where employees are matched with coaches who have relevant industry and professional experience, enabling individuals and enterprise to build better leaders, manager and colleagues.

name: Prolaera
description: Provider of an educational platform created for Continuing Professionals courses, compliance tracking, and professional development. The company's platform combines a compliance requirement tracking engine, an open course marketplace, and an online learning platform to deliver on-demand training, enabling candidates to significantly reduce administrative overhead costs and develop new skill sets faster.
